Seoul Visit 2026
Home Visit Schedule Student Takeaways
Home Visit Schedule Student Takeaways
Itinerary

Four days.
One journey .

18–21 May 2026

A four-day academic immersion across Seoul's leading universities and innovation centers — from KAIST and SKKU to Yonsei and Korea University, paired with cultural exploration of the city.

Each day blends technical visits, hands-on labs, and meetings with faculty and students, alongside time to experience Seoul's blend of tradition and modernity.

Schedule below
7:00 AM
HKIA Aisle A · Cathay Pacific

Departure from Hong Kong → Arrival in Seoul

Group meet-up at HK International Airport Aisle A (Cathay Pacific). Group photos with CityU props before security, then flight to Incheon and AREX transfer to Hongik University / Shinchon-Ewha area.

4:20 PM
Hongik University / Shinchon-Ewha

Hotel Check-in · Hongik University Area

Self check-in at accommodation around Hongik University and Shinchon-Ewha. Evening free for rest and settling in; dismiss for the day.

10:00 AM
SKKU Engineering Building

Sungkyunkwan University · Engineering Visit

Depart Shinchon at 8:25 AM via Sindorim to SKKU Station. Visit with Prof. Kyuhong Shim and Prof. Jongwuk Lee — engineering department tour and research discussions.

2:00 PM
KAIST AI Hub

KAIST AI Hub · Research Center Visit

Lunch on-site at AI Hub, then visit with Prof. Kate Shim (6F): department introduction, CVML Lab research overview, casual meeting with graduate students, Q&A, and research-space tour. Dismiss at KAIST AI Hub.

10:00 AM
Korea University · Science & Engineering Campus

Korea University · Campus Visit

Meet Prof. Paul Seo at the Main Gate of the Science & Engineering Campus, then walk to the Main Campus to meet Dr. William Stewart at the Centennial Memorial Samsung Hall / Ilmin Museum Building for a campus tour.

3:00 PM
Yonsei University · YERP Lobby

Yonsei Engineering Research Park

Meet students of Prof. Jeon at the YERP lobby. Campus tour followed by a mutual research introduction with 14 students from the Visual AI Lab and other labs.

6:00 PM
Shinchon

Group Dinner with Yonsei Students

Group dinner together with Yonsei students and faculty after the research exchange. Dismiss directly after dinner.

9:30 AM
Seoul City Hall · B1 & B2

Seoul Gallery · City Hall

Free visit to the Seoul Gallery on B1 and B2 of Seoul City Hall, followed by team-based exploration and lunch on your own before the afternoon TOPIS visit.

1:00 PM
Seoul Safety Integration Center · B3

Seoul TOPIS · Smart Transportation

Meet on the 1F of the main Seoul City Hall building and proceed to the Seoul Safety Integration Center (B3). 15-min promotional video, briefing on Seoul TOPIS, Q&A, and group photo. Dismiss directly after the visit.

CU
City University of Hong Kong
Department of Computer Science
